title: A Dirty Meeting
content: You track Miller's unmarked car to a basement casino in Camden. Staying in the shadows, you watch him meet a broad-shouldered man in a utility jacket.||The exchange is quick and tense. Miller looks like a man who hasn't slept in weeks. He hands over a small package and leaves without a word.||You don't recognize the man, but his professional, clinical manner is chilling. Miller is clearly in deep with someone dangerous on these streets.||📝 FILES UPDATED: Miller's street meeting logged.
